title: Full IDE bridge protocol (VS Code / JetBrains)
description:
OC has acp.rs (Anthropic Code Protocol); CC has bridge/ with a richer IDE contract: file-opened events, selection events, LSP diagnostic forwarding, inline edit handoff, cursor-position sync.

## Scope
- Extend acp.rs (or new src/bridge/) with additional message types
- File-opened / selection-changed handlers
- LSP diagnostic bridge
- Extension skeletons for VS Code + JetBrains would be out of scope for this issue — covered in plugins/ issue

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/bridge/
